name: Key Lime Pie (Cheesecake)
recipeInstructions:
-------------
For the Filling:
Cream cheese (softened): 8 ounces
Sweetened condensed milk: 15 ounces
Key lime juice: 1/3 cup
Lime oil (optional but good): 1/8 teaspoon
Sour cream: 1 cup
To prepare the crust:
1. Combine all of the crust ingredients and press into a 9-inch pie pan or spring form pan. Bake at 350°F for about 20 minutes or until nicely golden brown, then set aside to cool.
2. In a medium-sized bowl, thoroughly mix together the cream cheese and milk, then blend in the Key lime juice and lime oil (if used).
3. Beat in the sour cream and mix until smooth, pour into the prepared crust, and refrigerate for at least 2 hours before serving.
